rationale: The Administrator user created two scheduled tasks (A0, EV-001) within a short time frame. The first task (A0) attempts to execute a file from a suspicious path 'C:\Users\Public\Disk101.ini:59e9c935' using wmic, which is indicative of persistence and potential data stream abuse. The second task (EV-001) attempts to execute a JavaScript file 'C:\Users\Public\Weber0.js' via explorer.exe, further suggesting malicious persistence and execution.
